purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Helian Xuedai high-ranking bear-clan multi-state character reference board, revised to avoid cute bear-ear identity cues.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem is locked. Do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Helian Xuedai crest, modern logo, large chest badge, shoulder patch, flag, or banner.
must_have: Helian Xuedai must read as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female warrior guard with a human face, not a bear-face beast head
do not rely on bear ears for identity; no prominent round fluffy bear-ear silhouette

oppressive human-beastfolk face with heavy brow ridge, compressed cheekbones, wide jaw, thick straight nose bridge, broad cold-darkened nasal plane, firm unsmiling mouth, and narrow predatory deep-brown eyes with faint ice-blue cold light
white polar-bear sideburn fur along temples, cheek edges, jaw hinge, nape, and upper neck, blending into the fur mantle without becoming an animal muzzle
bear-clan claw-shaped facial markings on forehead and cheeks
heavy guard scale: 2.02-2.1 m, 125-155 kg, broad shoulders, thick neck, heavy forearms, huge hands, thick knuckles, callused palm pads, and short black claws
white bear fur mantle, silver-black bone-iron chest armor, ice-grey woven layer, dark brown leather abdomen guard, bronze bracers, jade clasp, red oath cord, tower shield, guard axe, ice-stud boots
distinct from Lu Mi: bear-clan heavy guard, not Frosthoof deer noble, not shaman, not deer-rider
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: cute plush bear ears, prominent round fluffy ears, toy ears, headband ears, pom-pom ears, hair-bun ears, cosplay ears, teddy bear ears, mascot ears, cute animal girl, soft round doll face, gentle princess gaze, blank fashion model eyes, seductive look, smile, bear-face beast head, animal muzzle, bear snout, long animal muzzle, full bear head, full animal paws, quadruped animal, low-ranking tribesperson, redesigned Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem, new bear crest, personal crest, modern logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, flag, deer ears, deer antlers, deer markings, Frosthoof deer noble silhouette, Lu Mi costume clone, ordinary human wearing decorative bear-ear headband, cute bear mascot, generic elf princess, southern palace maid, sexy exposed costume, poor ragged shaman, torn dirty fur, beggar rags, full-body mud, monster horde, game orc camp, shaman bone flute focus, snow herb pouch focus, ice-blue ritual fire focus, high-saturation xianxia glow, blue-purple magic aura, large spell circle, attack magic, floating weapons, Qingming white official costume, Grey Wall soldier grey cloth, Zhaoming vermilion-blue formal robe, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Helian Xuedai from the series Severed Homeland. Use existing project character-board layout logic: top row three full-body states of the same person, lower rows with close-up detail panels and material swatches, no visible labels or captions. Helian Xuedai is a 24-year-old high-ranking white-bear-clan female heavy guard, Lu Mi's close protector and clan ritual boundary enforcer. Main correction: no cute plush bear ears. The top of her head must not have prominent round fluffy toy ears. If ears are visible at all, they are small, low, scarred, flattened, partly hidden under braids, temple hair, sideburn fur, and the white fur collar; they should read as battle-worn anatomical ear folds, not cute circular accessories. The bear identity must not depend on ears. Correct identity: human face first, but strongly beastfolk and command-ranked. She is a senior female warrior, not a low-ranking tribesperson, not a decorative princess, and not a shaman. Bear-clan identity should come from a powerful broad northern female face with heavy brow ridge, compressed cheekbones, wide jaw, thick straight nose bridge, broad cold-darkened nasal plane, firm unsmiling mouth, taut cheek planes, frost-roughened skin, and a stare that feels like she is deciding whether to kill someone. Add white polar-bear sideburn fur along temples, cheek edges, jaw hinge, nape, and upper neck, blending into the fur mantle without becoming a full animal muzzle. Add dark bear-claw-shaped facial markings across forehead and cheeks, like clan war marks, not decorative makeup. Eyes are deep brown with faint ice-blue cold light, narrowed and slightly upturned under heavy brows, predatory, blade-sharp, and calm with murderous restraint. Do not give her an animal snout, beast head, full bear face, or full animal paws. Body scale: 2.02 to 2.1 meters tall, 125 to 155 kg, visibly bigger than human guards and much broader than Lu Mi, but still dignified and high-ranking. Strong neck, broad shoulders, shield-like chest, heavy forearms, huge hands, thick knuckles, callused palm pads, blackened short claws, powerful legs. Show slight white fur along outer forearms and backs of hands in close-up panels, integrated with human-like hands. Her posture should feel like a living gate: controlled, ritualized, and ready to break an attacker. Show the same Helian Xuedai in three continuous states: 1) high guard formal state, white bear fur heavy mantle over silver-black bone-iron chest armor, ice-grey thick woven underlayer, dark brown leather abdomen guard, bronze bracers, bone toggles, jade clasp, rawhide belt, red oath cord, bone-iron tower shield resting beside her, long-handled guard axe held low, formal protective blocking posture, no prominent cute ears; 2) snowline escort battle-ready state, fur mantle strapped down for movement, shield forward, guard axe ready, travel straps and gear visible, wide ice-stud boots planted in snow, weighty forward stance, one huge clawed hand visible gripping shield or axe, no cute ear silhouette; 3) clan ritual boundary enforcer state, same heavy guard body with added bone-gold armor edge, jade clasp chain, red oath cord, small wind-worn bonewood command token, formal executioner-like blocking posture used to enforce ritual boundaries, not a shaman performance. Include lower detail panels: oppressive human-beastfolk face with heavy brow and no cute ears; narrow murderous ice-lit eye close-up; cheek, jaw, and nape white bear fur close-up with bear-claw facial markings; huge forearm and hand with thick knuckles, blackened short claws, and callused palm pads; white bear fur mantle edge; silver-black bone-iron chest armor; bronze bracer sized for massive forearm; rawhide belt, bone toggles, jade clasp, red oath cord; bone-iron tower shield with old scratches and bear-claw gouges as material marks, not a badge; long-handled guard axe or short breaching axe; wide ice-stud boot; material swatches of white bear fur, silver-black bone iron, black iron, bronze, dark brown leather, ice-grey thick weave, jade green, bonewood, dark red oath cord, snow dust. Badge rule: do not redesign the locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem. Do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Helian Xuedai crest, chest badge, shoulder patch, flag, or banner. Use northern symbol language only as material reference for bonewood knots, bear-claw cuts, rawhide cord, oath cord, and small carved tokens. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic fur, bone-iron, leather, bronze, bone, jade, rawhide, snow, restrained cinematic lighting, production reference clarity. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark.
